description: CompositionMaroon round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, fabric tape on inseam of the neckline and graphic print on the frontFittingRegularWash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove immediately Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Time to show the world how popular you are... if not in this country, then in a different one at least! Let people know that you are Page 3 material in Kyrgystan by donning this maroon tantra tee.
